title: What's Installed
description:
What's Installed

What's installed

The directories and files shown in the table below are installed on your PC during installation.

Directories
		 and Files	Description

（Data
		 folder)\API\VS20xx\VB\DEMOS	Visual Basic .NET demonstrations

（Data
		 folder)\API\VS20xx\VCS\DEMOS	Visual C# .NET demonstrations

（Data
		 folder)\API\VS20xx\VC\DEMOS	Visual C++ .NET demonstrations

（Program
		 folder）\API\LabVIEW	LabVIEW VI Library installer

（Data
		 folder)\PROJECTS\API_Demos	Epson RC+ 8.0 projects for demos

（Program
		 folder）

\API\Assembly\net462\RCAPINt2.dll	RCAPINet library for .NET Framework (32
		 bit or 64 bit)

（Program
		 folder）\API\Assembly

		\net6.0-windows\RCAPINt2.dll	RCAPINet library for.NET6 (32 bit or 64
		 bit)
